# Vendored UCIP Core

This public repository vendors only the minimal UCIP core source needed by [observatory/ucip_core_bridge.py](../../observatory/ucip_core_bridge.py).

Public release guidance:

- `src/` is the runtime dependency surface.
- Legacy paper drafts, patent-draft materials, notebooks, duplicate nested repositories, and other private collateral are not part of the public observatory release story and should remain outside this bundle.
- Downstream observatory metrics in this repository are exploratory proxy telemetry and are not equivalent to the upstream UCIP latent-structure framework.
